verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here in my heart Forever grateful Is all my love Forever faithful Lord You're all I have all I need all I want

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My dearest friend My true companion You took me in Lost and abandoned Lord You're all I have all I need all I want

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And this is just a token of devotion To heaven's love as deep as any ocean

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All my life all my breath every word every step Every beat of my heart will sing Every joy every fear every smile every tear Is the least that my soul can bring It's my offering

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I can't explain This transformation But by Your Spirit I'm awakened Lord You're all I have all I need all I want

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I can't repay So great a mercy Poured out each day But I am learning Lord You're all I have all I need all I want
